title: Rejlii Mithel
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Rejlii_Mithel.jpg]] |name=Rejlii Mithel |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]''[[The Last Command]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]][[The Last Command 1|''The Last Command'' 1]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Fair |cyber= |families=new |parents=[[Mithel/Legends|Mithel]]{{CSWECite|II|320|Mithel, Mauler}} |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] **[[Thrawn's confederation]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|The Empire needs quick and creative minds, Ensign. You're hereby promoted to lieutenant… and your first assignment is to find a way to break a covert shroud.|Grand Admiral Thrawn promotes Rejlii Mithel|}} '''Rejlii Mithel''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] weapons [[Technician/Legends|technician]] who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He was the son of [[Mithel/Legends|"Mauler" Mithel]], an Imperial [[TIE pilot]] who fought and [[Death/Legends|died]] in the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], fresh out of training, Rejlii Mithel was assigned to the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] as a [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] operator. He was instrumental in saving the ''Chimaera'' from destruction at the [[Limb/Legends|hands]] of the [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Nuso Esva]], who had sabotaged the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] during a [[Battle of the Poln system|battle]] above the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Poln Major]]. Using his command of the tractor beam, Mithel successfully implemented a tactic developed on the spot by [[Captain of the Line/Legends|Senior Captain]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] to pull the Imperial [[Warship/Legends|warship]] off its collision course with a [[Golan I Space Defense Platform/Legends|Golan I platform]] above Poln Major. By [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], [[Ensign/Legends|Ensign]] Mithel continued to serve aboard the ''Chimaera'' as a tractor beam operator, and in that [[Standard year/Legends|year]] he was charged with capturing [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] as he fled the planet [[Poderis]] in a [[720 light freighter/Legends|Class 720 freighter]]. However, as Mithel locked onto the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] flew off in an [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]] that had been concealed within the larger [[Starship/Legends|vessel]], using a [[Covert Shroud Maneuver|covert shroud maneuver]] to evade capture. A successful counter to the maneuver had never been developed, but the Ensign attempted to ensnare the X-wing nonetheless before the tractor beam froze up and Skywalker escaped. Mithel reported his failure to [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] Thrawn, who noted the ingenuity of the operator's effort. Thrawn applauded Mithel for his quick thinking, promoting him to the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] and tasking him with developing an effective response to the covert shroud. ==Biography== ===Early military service=== {{Quote|Can you handle the rest of this?''"
"''Yes, sir. Unless Lord Odo—I mean unless Nuso Esva has left us more surprises, we should be all right.|Commander Pellaeon and Mithel discuss the ''Chimaera''{{'s}} status|''[[Choices of One]]''}} Rejlii Mithel was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served in the [[Imperial Military/Legends|armed forces]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as a weapons [[Technician/Legends|technician]] specialized in [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] operation.''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]'' His [[Mithel/Legends|father]], a [[TIE pilot]] who [[Death/Legends|perished]] in the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]],{{Film|IV}} kept a [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] of a young Rejlii on the [[control yoke]] of [[Black 2|his TIE fighter]].{{CCG|set=Premiere Limited|cardname=Black 2}} By [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], the younger Mithel had completed his training and had been assigned to the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] as a tractor beam operator. In that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the ''Chimaera'' was [[Saboteur/Legends|sabotaged]] by the [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Nuso Esva]] during a [[Battle of the Poln system|battle]] in the [[Poln system/Legends|Poln system]] and set on a collision course with a [[Golan I Space Defense Platform/Legends|Golan I platform]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Poln Major]]. With the [[Calo Drusan|''Chimaera''{{'s}} captain]] dead, command of the [[Warship/Legends|warship]] fell to [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]], who was faced with the task of averting the impending collision with assistance from [[Captain of the Line/Legends|Senior Captain]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], Esva's Imperial nemesis. Thrawn devised a plan to use the ''Chimaera''{{'s}} tractor beams and his [[Transport/Legends|transport]], the [[DeepWater-class light freighter|light freighter]] ''[[Lost Reef]]'', to knock the Star Destroyer off course. Given the ''Chimaera''{{'s}} situation, Mithel was the only tractor beam operator available, and it fell upon him to enact the strategy. Mithel succeeded in snaring the ''Lost Reef'' with the Star Destroyer's tractor beam, drawing in and releasing the smaller [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] in a repeated pattern. Due to the nature of the tractor beam, Mithel's execution of Thrawn's tactic enabled both the Star Destroyer and the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] to move to their common center of mass, slowly shifting the ''Chimaera'' off its path. With the collision avoided, the warship was able to rejoin the Imperial forces in driving off Nuso Esva. ===The Thrawn campaign=== {{Quote|Sir, I had just established a positive lock on the freighter when it broke up into a cluster of trac-reflective particles. The targeting system tried to lock on all of them at once and went into a loop snarl.''"
"''And what did you do?''"
"''I—sir, I knew that if I waited for the particles to dissipate normally, the target starfighter would be out of range. So I tried to dissipate them myself by shifting the tractor beam into sheer-plane mode.''"
"''It didn't work.''"
"''No, sir. The target-lock system couldn't handle it. It froze up completely.|Ensign Mithel explains his actions to Grand Admiral Thrawn|}} [[File:RejliiMithelQuickThinker-TLC1.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Mithel explains his actions to Grand Admiral Thrawn.]] [[Ensign/Legends|Ensign]] Mithel continued to serve aboard the ''Chimaera'' as a tractor beam operator. In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], Thrawn, now a [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]], launched a [[Thrawn campaign|military campaign]] against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in the wake of the Empire's [[Battle of Endor/Legends|fragmentation]] [[4 ABY/Legends|five years prior]], using the ''Chimaera'' as his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]]. As part of his campaign, Thrawn set a [[Mission to Poderis|trap]] for New Republic hero and [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] on the planet [[Poderis]], hoping to capture the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. After evading the Imperial forces on the planet, Skywalker fled aboard a [[720 light freighter/Legends|Class 720 freighter]] into [[Realspace/Legends|space]], where Thrawn and the ''Chimaera'' were awaiting him. It fell upon Ensign Mithel to ensure the Jedi was captured. Operating from the [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge's]] starboard crew pit, Mithel prepared to capture Skywalker's freighter in a tractor beam before the Jedi could escape the [[Poderis system/Legends|system]]. However, Skywalker had been prepared for such an occurrence. Using a [[Covert Shroud Maneuver|covert shroud maneuver]], he activated his ship's self-destruct sequence and flew off in an [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]] held in the vessel's modified cargo bay just as the tractor beam secured a lock on the freighter. When the ship exploded, the tractor beam was unable to compensate for the large amount of debris, prompting Mithel to improvise. The Ensign attempted to counteract Skywalker's maneuver by quickly adjusting the beam's setting in an effort to lock on to the X-wing, but the attempt failed as the tractor beam froze. Though the ''Chimaera'' opened fire on the X-wing, Skywalker was able to make the jump to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. Realizing his failure, Mithel expected to be executed for allowing Skywalker to escape (having recently witnessed Thrawn's summary execution of [[Cris Pieterson]] after a similar failure). Nevertheless, the tractor beam operator calmly explained what had transpired when questioned by the Grand Admiral, noting that he had been unprepared to deal with a covert shroud maneuver. Rather than punish the Ensign, Thrawn applauded Mithel for his quick thinking and innovative, if unsuccessful, attempt to counter Skywalker's tactic, promoting Mithel to the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] and assigning him the task of finding an effective response to the covert shroud. Shocked by the turn of events, Mithel graciously accepted the assignment. The new lieutenant proceeded to analyze the covert shroud maneuver and look for a way to thwart it, ultimately determining that the method he had employed against Skywalker's use of the covert shroud would have been successful had the control computer of his tractor beam been modified to handle the [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] signals produced by multiple trac-reflective particles. Mithel prepared a communique for the Grand Admiral in which he briefly detailed the covert shroud maneuver and included his findings; he also added a request asking that a skilled computer technician be assigned to reprogram a tractor beam's control computer to put the theory to the test. Mithel's transmission was later intercepted by the New Republic. Mithel's efforts would eventually bear fruit, providing the Empire with a standard means of countering a covert shroud. In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] attempted to use the gambit to escape the Star Destroyer ''[[Relentless]]'', and was flabbergasted when the shroud was quickly dissipated and the tractor lock on Calrissian's yacht, the [[Lady Luck/Legends|''Lady Luck'']], just as quickly re-established, leaving him with no choice except to surrender. The con artist [[Flim (Human)|Flim]], in disguise as a resurrected Grand Admiral Thrawn, explained to Calrissian that the Empire had had more than enough time after Skywalker's escape from Poderis to develop a countermeasure for his escape tactic.''[[Specter of the Past]]'' ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Several methods have been suggested over the past few decades for counteracting the covert shroud gambit, none of which has ever been made practical. Yours was one of the more innovative attempts, particularly given how little time you had to come up with it. The fact that it failed does not in any way diminish that.|Thrawn lauds Mithel's attempt at counteracting a covert shroud maneuver|}} [[File:Rejlii_Mithel_signature.png|thumb|right|200px|Rejlii Mithel's signature]] Fair-skinned with [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]], Rejlii Mithel was an energetic and courageous [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] committed to serving the Empire, the kind of talented being whom Thrawn wanted to make up a [[Thrawn's confederation|renewed Empire]]. During the battle in the Poln system in 0 ABY, Mithel was able to use his command of the tractor beam to successfully employ Thrawn's makeshift tactic, saving the ''Chimaera'' from destruction. He later reported on the Star Destroyer's status with an audacity that caught Pellaeon off-guard, as Mithel was merely a crewer, not a bridge officer. Years later, Mithel continued to serve as one of the ''Chimaera''{{'s}} tractor beam operators, and he was charged with capturing Jedi Luke Skywalker above Poderis in 9 ABY. He attempted to counter Skywalker's covert shroud maneuver by altering his tractor beam's mode, a quick-thinking improvisation that ultimately failed to capture the Jedi. Mithel feared he would be executed for the failure as another tractor beam [[Cris Pieterson|operator]] had been a few months earlier for his failure to capture Skywalker. Nevertheless, Mithel calmly explained his actions to Grand Admiral Thrawn, who knew that an effective countermeasure to the covert shroud had never been developed. Impressed by the Ensign's effort and potential, the Grand Admiral rewarded the tractor beam operator with a promotion and a new assignment to put Mithel's creativity to use in developing a successful response to the covert shroud maneuver. Ultimately, Mithel determined that his tactic would have been successful had his tractor beam's control computer been programmed to deal with trac-reflective particles. ==Behind the scenes== Lieutenant Mithel was created by author [[Timothy Zahn]] for ''[[The Last Command]]'', the [[1993]] conclusion to his [[Star Wars: The Thrawn Trilogy|Thrawn Trilogy]]. The [[1994|following year]], Mithel was given both a first name and a visual depiction in ''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]'', which also contained some roleplaying statistics for use in ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. He also appeared, in a condensed version of his scene from the novel, in the [[The Last Command 1|first issue]] of [[Star Wars: The Last Command (comic series)|''The Last Command'' comic adaptation]], released on [[November 26]], [[1997]]. After the character went over a decade without another appearance, Timothy Zahn included Mithel as a minor character in his [[2011]] novel, ''[[Choices of One]]''. ==Appearances== *''[[Choices of One]]'' *''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *[[The Last Command 1|''The Last Command'' 1]] ==Sources== *''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]'' *{{CCG|set=Premiere Limited|cardname=Black 2}} *''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]'' *{{FactFile|5|THR 1-4|Grand Admiral Thrawn}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Rejlii Mithel |pl=Rejlii Mithel }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Mithel, Rejlii}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Navy officers of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Thrawn's fleet personnel]]
